selectedSlice: Add shareable URL state to the existing Presentation section filters.
selectionReason: The Presentation section already had real in-page filters, but handlePresentationFilterAction() only changed in-memory state and re-rendered the section. Reusing the existing section URL-state pattern was the safest bounded improvement because it preserved current scoped routes and roles while fixing reload/share continuity.
userFacingImprovement: Roles that already have Presentation access can now reload or share ready-for-check-out, checked-out, checked-in, or outline-follow-up focus through the existing workspace URL.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No new route, route query parameter, mutation, role, tenant scope, site scope, program scope, mentor scope, or student scope was added.
The new presentationFocus URL param only narrows rows already returned by the existing scoped /api/presentation-slots route.
Presentation check-out and check-in controls remain limited to the current authorized roles.

validation.notes: git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

deferred: Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend queue rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Global Admin role refresh remains broader than this local continuity slice.
nextRecommended: Keep Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise scoped destination exists; if that remains blocked, inspect a bounded Global Admin role refresh across the existing Audit, Programs, Student Directory, and Presentation flows.
doNotRepeat: Do not regress the Presentation section back to in-memory-only focus state while presentationFocus restore and sync are now proven.
Do not invent new /api/presentation-slots query params or broaden role visibility while extending Presentation continuity.
